title: Compute P95 Latency
description:
Each line is an integer latency in milliseconds. Return the 95th percentile using the nearest-rank method: sort the values, P95 index = ceil(0.95 * n) - 1 (0-indexed).

Return the integer value as a string.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results
